title: The Money Rule Schools Never Teach

segments.text: There's one money rule school never taught you.
And it's why so many smart people stay broke.
Pay yourself first, before any bill or treat.
Automate it so you never even see the money.
Wealth is built quietly, on autopilot.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Pay yourself first and automate it — wealth is built on autopilot. Follow for daily money wisdom!
